title: Moewe's Modded Vanilla
description:
A small modpack that merges performance and Quality of Life mods.
Basically the mods that i always play with personally.
body:
# Moewe's Modded Vanilla

MMV is made with a good balance between performance and quality of life in mind.\
If you want a pack that gives you good performance\
while still satisfying all your quality of life needs,\
then look no further because with MMV you have all that and more!


<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>
  
**The versioning system i use is <x.y.z.> where:**

  
- x: Minecraft Version Change
  
- y: Major change to mods(adding/removing one or more)

- z: Updated Mods

</details>
